title: SIP AuditRecord
description: An immutable audit log entry produced for every IntentEnvelope processed by the SIP broker. Audit records are write-once and capture the full context of the broker's decision.

audit_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the audit record was created.

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing trace ID, inherited from the IntentEnvelope.

intent_id.description: ID of the IntentEnvelope that triggered this audit record.

actor_id.description: ID of the actor that submitted the intent.

intent_name.description: Name of the intent that was processed.

operation_class.description: Operation class of the processed intent.

selected_capability_id.description: ID of the capability selected by the broker. Null if no capability was matched.

selected_binding.description: Execution binding selected. Null if no plan was created.

action_taken.description: The action taken by the broker.

policy_allowed.description: Whether the policy engine permitted this intent.

outcome_summary.description: Outcome summary for this audit entry.

notes.description: Additional human-readable notes about this audit entry.

originator.description: Originator actor ID, if provenance was attached to the intent.

submitting_actor.description: Submitting actor ID, if different from the originator (delegation).

delegation_chain.description: Delegation chain from the intent's provenance block.
